headline: Assessing Waste Management (WM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Mixed Returns
summary: How Waste Management Stock Has Been Performing Recently Waste Management (WM) has drawn investor attention after a mixed stretch in its share price, with a 1 day decline of 1.1% and a 4.7% drop over the past week. Over the past month, the stock shows a 2.3% decline, while the past 3 months reflect a 1.6% gain, giving investors a recent performance range to weigh against longer term returns. headline: Is It Time To Reassess Waste Management (WM) After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you have ever wondered whether Waste Management at around US$224.94 is still a fair deal or starting to look stretched, the current numbers give plenty to think about. The stock shows a 4.7% decline over the last 7 days and a 2.3% decline over 30 days, while returns stand at 3.0% year to date, 0.6% over 1 year, 52.1% over 3 years and 88.1% over 5 years.
